title: Block On Head
description: A small plugin that allows players in survival mode to put blocks and objects on their heads as a decorative element. This allows players to diversify their style and add a touch of humor to the game.
body:
# **DRESS TO IMPRESS**
![General Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461fc0cefa85c35479d3132ded3918fcfd2d35f4_0.webp)

Now you can put ANYTHING on your head!


You can equip:
- Any blocks
  
- Any items
  
- Custom models created using CIT mechanics
